title: Qlog Import And Rehydration Implementation Lane
summary: Implement a sibling qlog import package that hydrates the repository's contained JSON and sequential JSON Text Sequences output back into the retained model for replay-oriented consumers.
planned_changes: Add `src/Incursa.Qlog.Import` with reader entry points, format dispatch, retained-model hydration, and preservation of unknown members. Keep the work out of `Incursa.Qlog` core hot paths, and add requirement-homed tests that round-trip the repository's own serializer outputs through the new importer.
out_of_scope: Changing the existing serializer output formats.
CBOR import in the first slice.
Any new public replay-specific object model.
verification_plan: Run SpecTrace validation, then add requirement-homed tests covering contained JSON import, sequential JSON Text Sequences import, extension-preservation round trips, and invalid-input rejection, with string and Stream parity checks where applicable.
